title: Phenakospermum guyannense

It belongs to the family Phenakospermales, which is a small family of flowering plants. Phenakospermum guyannense is further classified as a member of the genus Phenakospermum. intro: Phenakospermum guyannense, also known as Guyana wood, is a tropical plant species native to the Guiana Shield in South America. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its potential anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties.
